description: Update ARCHITECTURE.md to accurately reflect the now-functional audio processing pipeline. Remove the note about Polly synchronous API limitation. Update the Orchestration Layer section to describe the Lambda-based processing approach. Update the Mermaid diagram to show the Lambda handling Polly internally rather than a separate SynthesizeSpeech state. Move Polly TTS from 'Planned' to the existing implementation table. Add a section describing the processing steps and output artifacts.
steps: Step 1 - Update the 'Implemented' table in ARCHITECTURE.md: (a) Update the Lambda entry to reflect its new capabilities (S3 read/write, Polly synthesis, DynamoDB update). (b) Remove 'Lambda: Polly TTS' from the 'Planned' table (it is now integrated into the main Lambda). (c) Update the Step Functions state machine description to remove the SynthesizeSpeech step and show the Lambda doing all processing.

Step 2 - Update the 'Orchestration Layer' section: (a) Change the happy path to: PutMetadataRecord -> ValidateFileExtension -> ProcessAudioMetadata(Lambda, full processing) -> UpdateMetadataStatus(COMPLETED) -> PublishSuccessNotification. (b) Remove all references to the SynthesizeSpeech Polly task as a separate state. (c) Remove the note about synchronous Polly API binary AudioStream limitation. (d) Update the ProcessAudioMetadata Lambda description to include: downloads input from S3, determines processing type, invokes Polly for TTS synthesis, uploads output to S3 output bucket, updates DynamoDB with output metadata.

Step 3 - Update the Mermaid diagram: (a) Remove the separate 'PollyTTS' and 'SynthesizeSpeech' node from the orchestration flow. (b) Show ProcessAudio connecting directly to S3Output (stores processed audio) and DDB (writes metadata). (c) Show ProcessAudio connecting to UpdateCompleted. (d) Add an internal annotation showing 'Polly TTS' happens inside the Lambda. (e) Move PollyTTS from planned styling to implemented. (f) Update the flow arrows to match the new chain.

Step 4 - Add a new section 'Audio Processing Pipeline Details' describing: (a) Input handling: S3 download of uploaded file. (b) Processing logic: text files -> Polly TTS with Neural voice; audio files -> Polly narration generation. (c) Output: MP3 file uploaded to output bucket with naming convention. (d) Metadata: DynamoDB updated with output location, file size, format. (e) Error handling within Lambda: structured logging, descriptive exceptions.
Step 5 - Verify ARCHITECTURE.md is valid markdown with valid Mermaid syntax (no broken links or missing nodes).
acceptance_criteria: ARCHITECTURE.md Orchestration Layer section accurately describes the Lambda-based processing flow without a separate Polly state
The note about synchronous Polly API binary AudioStream limitation is removed
The Mermaid diagram shows ProcessAudio Lambda connecting to S3Output and DDB directly
The 'Planned' section no longer lists 'Lambda: Polly TTS'
A new section describes the audio processing pipeline details (input, processing, output, metadata)
The Implemented table is updated with the enhanced Lambda capabilities
verification: Run 'mvn test' - all tests still pass (documentation change should not break anything)
